title: Fix cells.add manifest example — revert to runnable --file form, keep stdin description nudge
action: The stdin-first-nudge change set cells.add examples[0] to a shell pipeline with a placeholder JSON, violating the registry's runnable-example contract and turning test_bee_cli.mjs red (109/12). Revert examples to the single runnable 'bee cells add --file cell-demo-1.json --json' (which the harness executes and which creates the demo-1 fixture the rest of the chain needs). Keep the stdin-first description nudge (safe, not executed). Sync source and .bee/bin mirror byte-identical.
must_haves: cells.add examples[0] is a runnable bee --file form

trace.outcome: Reverted cells.add examples[0] to runnable 'bee cells add --file cell-demo-1.json --json'; kept stdin-first description nudge; source+mirror byte-identical. test_bee_cli back to 121/0.
trace.verify_output: test_lib: 293 passed, 0 failed; test_bee_cli: 121 passed, 0 failed
